[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''Bril'nilim''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] officer in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] as of [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. He was in charge of the [[New Republic Army|ground soldiers]] left behind on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]]. He commanded them in the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1st}}
